title: Game Suit 2
description: Game Suit 2 Is The Advanced Version Of The First Mod I Ever Created Game Suit
body:
Game Suit 2 Is The Advanced Version Of The First Mod I Ever Created Game Suit

 

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/game-suit

 

Which Added Edged Sticks, Dirt Sword, Graphite Ore, Ingots And Tools, Pencils, Drawings, Wallets, And Food

 

Game Suit 2 Adds All Of This (-Wallets) But Most Of It Is Actually Obtainable And Useful

 

This Mod Also Adds More Stuff Like 

More Food

A Cheese Maker

Throwing Cards (Heavy Beta Probably Stay Away From These)

Structures

And 

Crafting Recipes For More Than Like 2 Items

 

All Items Are Currently Obtainable In One Way Or Another

You Can Find Items In Structures, Craft Them, Or Forage Them From Trees Or Bushes
